title: cephalotaxus harringtonia var. sphaeralis
intro: Cephalotaxus harringtonia var. sphaeralis, also known as Japanese plum yew, is a plant species that belongs to the yew family (Taxaceae) and is native to Japan. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and anticancer activities. The health benefits of Cephalotaxus harringtonia var. sphaeralis include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, although its use should be supervised by a healthcare professional due to potential toxicity and side effects.
